title: Handmade Faith-Inspired Gifts & Memphis Garden Goods • Cooper-Young, Memphis TN
announcement: Welcome to Morning Reflections Shop! I'm Rebecca - a Memphis chaplain and radio host who makes handmade gifts rooted in faith, warmth, and the rhythms of everyday life. All items are made in my Cooper-Young bungalow studio. Zinnias, lavender, and a gray tabby named Mercy inspire most of what you find here. Custom orders welcome - just message me!
sale_message: Thank you so much for your order! Each piece is made with care in my Memphis home studio. I'll have your item ready to ship within my processing window. Reach out anytime if you have questions - I love hearing from you.
digital_sale_message: Radio show Sun 6 AM — Grace on Grace episode.
policy_welcome: Thank you for visiting Morning Reflections Shop! Everything here is handmade by me - a Board Certified Chaplain and radio host in Memphis, TN. My hope is that each piece carries a little warmth into your home or the home of someone you love.
policy_payment: I accept all major credit cards, Etsy gift cards, and PayPal through Etsy's secure checkout. Custom orders over $200 require a 50% deposit to begin.
policy_shipping: All orders ship via USPS from Memphis, TN 38104. Ready-to-ship items go out within 3-5 business days. Custom and made-to-order items ship within the processing time listed on each listing. Items are carefully packaged to arrive safely.
policy_refunds: Your satisfaction matters to me. If your item arrives damaged, contact me within 48 hours with photos and I will make it right. Due to the handmade nature of my work, I cannot accept returns for buyer's remorse, but please reach out and we'll talk through any concern.
